hero.title: Handcrafted cards — for those who deserve to be amazed.
hero.subtitle: Every card is meticulously handcrafted by an artist — made exclusively for you and your loved one. No printing, just authentic materials and genuine care.

title.part1: A real greeting isn't something you just pick off a shelf. It’s your words, your photos, and the name of someone you love—
title.part2: brought to life by a master craftsman in just 20 to 60 minutes.

promoCards.cta: Add your text, name, date, and photo to make it truly yours.

fast.title: Rapid Crafting
fast.description: Each card is meticulously handcrafted in 20–60 minutes.

delivery.title: Direct-to-Recipient Delivery
delivery.description: Enter the recipient’s address, and we’ll ship it directly on your behalf.

unique.title: Uniqueness in Every Stroke
unique.description: No two cards are ever the same. Each one carries the unique touch of the artisan who brought it to life.

handmade.title: Handmade
handmade.description: It’s more than just aesthetics. It’s the time poured into every detail.

ours.title: Ours aren’t.
ours.description: Укажите адрес получателя — мы отправим напрямую от вашего имени.

unique.title: Уникальность в каждом штрихе
unique.description: Нет двух одинаковых открыток. Каждая несёт отпечаток рук того, кто её делал.

custom_cards.title: Custom Cards
custom_cards.description: Personalize it all: text, photos, names, and dates.

occasions.title: Birthdays, weddings, and sports milestones
occasions.description: Ten unique designs per category. Plenty of options to find "the one."

stats.title: How It Works
stats.subtitle: Crafted by hand, every single day. See the magic for yourself.

customers.name: Janis
customers.text: This card has so much soul. It feels like something a best friend would make just for you. A true work of art.

customers.name: Andrejs
customers.text: An anniversary gift for my wife. The creator added extra details that I didn't expect—it was stunning and truly unexpected.

customers.name: Linda
customers.text: Finally, a card that feels like a real gift, not just a print. Thank you for such quality.

cta.title: Create Your Card Right Now
cta.description: Keep it simple. Choose a design, add your words and photos. Let our creator do the rest.

newsletter.title: Unique Designs & Stories
newsletter.description: Sign up for updates. Get news on latest designs, sales, and inspiring gifting stories from our community.
newsletter.privacy_policy: By clicking the button, you agree to our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.

features.handmade: Each card is handcrafted by an artisan
features.unique: A unique design tailored just for you
features.delivery: Send it directly to your recipient

builder.title: Create Your Card
builder.name: Name
builder.preview_hint: We’ll generate unique handmade-style designs for you

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: Each card is carefully handcrafted by an artisan.
faq.q2: Can I upload my own photo?
faq.a2: Yes, you can upload an image up to 30MB.
